fields.value: A <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> describing the Vulkan component swizzle for the conversion.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the component swizzle mapping for the YCbCr conversion.

fields.value: true if the sampler filter must match the chroma filter; otherwise, false.
fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the sampler filter must match the chroma filter for this YCbCr conversion.

fields.value: true if linear filtering is supported for this YCbCr conversion; otherwise, false.
fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether linear filtering is supported for this YCbCr conversion.
